overview: Blue Lotus combines medical spa services with a one-year longevity medicine program that includes full-body diagnostic testing, IV infusions, and hormone optimization. The clinic focuses on evidence-based anti-aging interventions and preventive care to extend healthspan.
highlights: Full body MRI screening and epigenetic testing
One-year structured longevity program with personalized health planning
Medical spa with laser, injectable, and IV infusion treatments
targetAudience: People seeking preventive anti-aging care and long-term health optimization.
